install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from your Basecamp app registration at https://launchpad.37signals.com/integrations.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from your Basecamp app registration.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.description: The OAuth callback URL registered in your Basecamp app. Example: https://app.shielva.ai/oauth/basecamp/callback
